name: Road Train Truck Driving
description: Embark on an epic journey with Road Train Truck Driving, a game that redefines the truck driving experience. Navigate through diverse landscapes, managing a road train with skill and precision. This game tests your driving prowess and strategic planning as you haul cargo across challenging routes. Perfect for enthusiasts of heavy vehicles and long-haul adventures. Website Developer <a href='https://pl.bestcrazygames.com/'>https://pl.bestcrazygames.com/</a>
instructions: wasd to drive and C change camera truck
tags: Driving, Level, Levels, Mentolatux, Truck, Unity3D, WebGL
